name: 5-Day Toned Full Body Gym Plan
description: A 5-day gym plan designed to build a lean, toned body while covering all major muscle groups. Rest 60-90 seconds between sets and prioritize clean technique before increasing weight.

name: 15-Day Toned Body Gym Program
description: A 15-day gym program designed to build a leaner, stronger, and more toned body while covering all major muscle groups. It includes 5 main gym sessions per week with recovery days, controlled tempo, and beginner-to-intermediate friendly exercises.
